items.question: How do I book an appointment?
items.answer: You can book an appointment online through our booking system or contact us by phone. We will get back to you promptly.

items.question: How much does an initial consultation cost?
items.answer: The costs for an initial consultation depend on the scope of the advice. We will be happy to inform you in advance about the expected costs.

items.question: Can I also book an appointment outside of office hours?
items.answer: Yes, by arrangement, appointments outside our regular office hours are also possible.

items.question: What documents should I bring to the first appointment?
items.answer: Please bring all relevant documents related to your matter. This includes contracts, correspondence, and documents.

items.question: Do you also offer video consultations?
items.answer: Yes, we offer video consultations. Please let us know when booking your appointment if you would like a video consultation.

items.question: How long does a typical initial consultation last?
items.answer: An initial consultation typically lasts 30 to 60 minutes, depending on the complexity of your matter.

items.question: Will my legal expenses insurance cover the costs?
items.answer: This depends on your insurance policy. We recommend contacting your insurance provider in advance to obtain coverage confirmation.

items.question: What is the difference between Anwalt and Rechtsanwalt?
items.answer: In Germany, the professional title "Rechtsanwalt" (lawyer) is protected. Every admitted lawyer is automatically a Rechtsanwalt.

items.question: Can I also visit the office without an appointment?
items.answer: We recommend scheduling an appointment in advance to avoid long wait times. Without an appointment, we can only provide brief information.

items.question: How can I safely transmit my documents?
items.answer: You can bring your documents in person, send them by post, or use our secure upload portal. Please contact us for transmission details.
